title: Red Team Approval
description: Approval artifact from the red-team review cycle, recording the attack surface, blocking findings, and surviving weakness after adversarial testing.

candidate_packet_digest.description: SHA256 digest of the candidate packet under review

candidate_boundary_identifier.description: Identifier for the candidate boundary under red-team review

plan_revision.description: Revision number of the plan being reviewed

reviewer_set.description: List of red-team reviewers and their dispositions

attack_surface.description: Identified attack surface areas examined during review

blocking_findings.description: Findings that block approval and require repair

surviving_weakness.description: Strongest surviving weakness after red-team attack

issued_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the approval was issued
